query: SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.amount FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%SALMON SMKD COHO SLCD FZN BAP%';
